description: Reposition claru.ai landing page from data services to training data catalog for physical AI. New /v2 route with video hero, GSAP stacked dataset cards, enrichment pipeline slider, full-featured COBE globe with arcs and floating labels, and /catalog page. Does NOT touch existing V1 page.

userStories.title: Project scaffolding and data population
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the V2 route and file structure set up so I can build sections independently.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/v2/page.tsx exists as a client component with hydration-safe shell (useState mounted pattern)

Section components created as stubs in src/app/v2/components/sections/: HeroV2, DataGap, ThreeModes, CatalogShowcase, EnrichmentPipeline, CollectionNetwork, GameCapture, WhyClaru, SocialProofV2, FinalCTAV2
Page renders sections in order: Hero, DataGap, ThreeModes, CatalogShowcase, EnrichmentPipeline, CollectionNetwork, GameCapture, WhyClaru, SocialProofV2, FinalCTAV2
src/app/v2/components/ui/ created with Globe.tsx, DatasetCard.tsx, PipelineNode.tsx, EnrichmentOverlay.tsx stubs

src/app/v2/data/datasets.ts created with Dataset interface and 6 dataset entries with real counts: Egocentric Activity (~386K), Game Environment (~66K), Video Quality (~976K), Object Identity (~1.07M), Traffic (coming_soon), Robotic Arm (coming_soon)
src/app/v2/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts created reading prefers-reduced-motion media query
src/app/v2/hooks/useGlobe.ts created as empty hook
npm install cobe shaders completed
OKLCH CSS custom properties added to globals.css V2 section with 0.01 sage chroma neutrals
Dot grid background applied to V2 page layout
Lenis smooth scroll provider wraps V2 page
Placeholder solid-color WebP images at public/images/hero-poster.webp and public/images/datasets/
npm run dev serves /v2 without errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: BLOCKING - must complete before all other stories. Use @gsap/react useGSAP hook for all GSAP usage.

userStories.title: Hero section with video background and text scramble
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to immediately understand what Claru sells so I decide in 5 seconds whether to keep scrolling.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-viewport section with dark background #0a0908
Headline: 'The training data catalog for physical AI.' in Geist Sans, white, 72px desktop / 40px mobile, bold with per-character scramble reveal animation on load
Sub: 'Curated video datasets with depth, pose, and segmentation — built for robotics and embodied AI teams. Download, load, train.' white/80 20px/16px
Stats bar JetBrains Mono sage green: '3.7M+ annotations across kitchens, warehouses, roads, and game environments · 25+ licensed datasets · Depth + pose + segmentation on every clip'
Trust signal: 'Commercially licensed. Not scraped. Not synthetic.' JetBrains Mono white/60 14px
Two CTAs: 'Browse the Catalog' (sage green fill, /catalog) + 'Request Custom Collection' (ghost, scrolls to #contact)
Background: looping muted autoplay video with poster fallback. autoPlay muted loop playsInline. Separate desktop/mobile sources
Dark gradient overlay from-[#0a0908]/80 via-[#0a0908]/40 to-transparent
Shaders library <DotGrid> composited over video at low opacity sage green for terminal aesthetic
prefers-reduced-motion: poster only, no video, no text animation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use placeholder poster until real video extracted. Lead montage with robot arm footage.

userStories.title: Data Gap section with GSAP scroll-pinned split
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to understand why existing data sources are insufficient.
acceptanceCriteria: Section label '// THE DATA GAP' JetBrains Mono sage green 14px
GSAP ScrollTrigger pinned section: useGSAP hook, anticipatePin: 1, end: '+=150vh'
Left half: 4 degraded thumbnails with CSS grayscale(50%) brightness(0.6) contrast(0.8) plus shaders <Glitch> or <CRTScreen> overlay. Labels in muted red rgba(255,100,100,0.6)
One-liner: 'Open datasets get you started. Production models need purpose-collected, commercially licensed data with consistent enrichment across every clip.'
Right half: 2x2 grid same scene four ways - raw, depth (#4A9EDE), pose (#DE8A4A), segmentation (#9E6ADE)
Scroll: 0-40% both visible, 40-60% left fades, 60-100% right expands. Lenis ticker integration
ScrollTrigger.refresh() on resize and orientationchange
prefers-reduced-motion: static side-by-side, no pinning
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Sequential dependency: must finalize pin height before US-005.

userStories.title: Three Modes section (How It Works)
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to understand how to get data from Claru.
acceptanceCriteria: Section label '// HOW IT WORKS'
Three-column grid desktop, single column mobile
Each card: dark bg, border, Lucide icon sage green, title 20px bold, 3-4 bullets, CTA with arrow
Mode 1 Browse & Buy: catalog icon, /catalog link
Mode 2 Commission Collection: globe icon, scroll to #contact
Mode 3 Enrich Your Data: layers icon, scroll to enrichment section
Pricing line: 'Per-dataset licensing · Per-hour collection rates · Per-minute enrichment' JetBrains Mono white/60
Cards fade up 0.1s stagger via Framer Motion whileInView
prefers-reduced-motion: instant visibility
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Catalog Showcase with GSAP stacked cards
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to browse available datasets visually.
acceptanceCriteria: Section label '// DATA CATALOG'
6 stacked cards: pin: true, pinSpacing: false, anticipatePin: 1. Scale: 1 - (cards.length - index) * 0.025
Manual spacer div after section for pinSpacing compensation
will-change: transform only on active card
Each card: looping video thumbnail (poster + lazy video on intersection), name 24px bold, count with per-character count-up, modality badges with pulse, description, View Dataset link
Card hover: sage green glow, 4px lift, video scale 1.02
6 datasets from datasets.ts
After cards: 'View all 25+ datasets →' CTA to /catalog
Count-up via GSAP onEnter callback per card
iOS: ScrollTrigger.refresh() on resize, stopOverscroll(), touchMultiplier consideration
Below lg: disable pinning, vertical list
prefers-reduced-motion: vertical stack, no pinning
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: SEQUENTIAL after US-003. Test iOS Safari.

userStories.title: Enrichment Pipeline with before/after slider
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see how Claru enriches raw data.
acceptanceCriteria: Section label '// ENRICHMENT PIPELINE'
Pipeline nodes horizontal with animated dashed line connections (stroke-dashoffset data-flow effect)
Active node: sage green glow, scale 1.1, [PROCESSING...] terminal flicker, scanline CSS transition
Video frame ~720px 16:9
Range slider: 0-20% raw, 20-40% depth, 40-60% pose, 60-80% seg, 80-100% all + caption via clip-path
64px touch target wrapper for iOS
Keyboard accessible arrow keys
Skeleton loading state with pulse
prefers-reduced-motion: fully enriched static view
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Collection Network with full-featured COBE globe
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see Claru's global collection network visualized with data-flow arcs and location labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Section label '// GLOBAL COLLECTION'
COBE globe: dynamic import ssr: false, dark: 1, sage green markers, phi += 0.003
mapSamples: 16000 desktop, 8000 mobile
Custom lat/lng-to-screen projection in onRender callback for marker positions

Floating DOM labels over canvas tracking marker positions per frame: 'Egocentric Video' (India), 'Game Capture' (US), 'Warehouse Data' (E. Europe), 'Traffic Data' (SE Asia), 'Workplace' (Brazil) in JetBrains Mono 12px sage green with backdrop-blur
Labels fade via dot product visibility (transparent when behind globe)
SVG arc overlay: paths from projection math, stroke-dasharray + stroke-dashoffset animation, 3-4 arcs staggered showing data flowing to SF hub
Globe 500px desktop, 300px mobile
2x3 environment grid below (1x6 mobile): Kitchens, Warehouses, Roads, Offices, Game Studios, Retail
Copy: 'We collect where your robots will operate. Suburban kitchens. Factory floors. City streets. Not lab environments — real ones.'
globe.destroy() on unmount
prefers-reduced-motion: static globe image
No-WebGL fallback: dark SVG map with dots
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: ~120 lines custom projection code in Globe.tsx. Self-contained component.
